markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on technical issues, content strategy, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Redirects Blocked:** Broken redirects for ketamine state/city pages are blocking new content launches. GrowthX is testing a Prismic solution tomorrow; Innerwell will also investigate replicating a working blog redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Critical Link Fix:** High-priority task to replace \~30 broken footer links to ketamine pages. This is a simple copy-paste fix to remove dead links from a high-visibility area.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [**New Publishing Workflow:** To prevent site breaks, GrowthX will stage content in Prismic for Innerwell's Shanali to review and publish. This centralizes QA and allows for batch publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** A new "Therapy4" template for the ketamine cluster is in review. Innerwell will also provide a list of preferred research papers for GrowthX to reference in articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

## Topics

### Critical Site Issues

  - [**Broken Redirects**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Problem:** Ketamine state/city pages fail to redirect to new URLs, creating 404 errors.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [**Impact:** New city pages are paused to prevent creating more 404s.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
      - [**Solution Paths:**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
          - [**GrowthX:** Testing a Prismic-based solution tomorrow with a Prismic expert.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
          - [**Innerwell:** Investigating replicating a working blog redirect process.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Broken Footer Links**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Problem:** \~30 footer links to ketamine pages point to old, dead URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Impact:** High-visibility broken links negatively affect user experience and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace old URLs with new ones. This is a simple copy-paste fix, not a redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

### Workflow & Reporting

  - [**New Publishing Workflow**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Problem:** Multiple teams publishing in Prismic without coordination risks breaking the live site.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will stage content in Prismic → Innerwell's Shanali will review and publish.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Centralizes QA and enables batch publishing on low-traffic days.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard Update**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Enhancement:** The Looker dashboard now tracks purchases by content cohort (e.g., editorial, city level).](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Further segment city/state cohorts for more granular analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [**Ketamine "Therapy4" Template**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [**Status:** A new template for the ketamine content cluster is in review.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [**Concept:** Pages will focus on "ketamine first" (e.g., "Ketamine Therapy for \[Condition\]"), allowing for flexible targeting by condition, demographic, or situation.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Preferred Research Papers**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Request:** GrowthX asked for a list of Innerwell's preferred research papers to reference in articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures content aligns with internal standards and uses authoritative sources.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Confirm if blog redirects are also broken.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [Demo the Prismic redirect solution tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Implement the new publishing workflow with Shanali.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Create a ticket to segment city/state cohorts in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Innerwell:**](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [Fix the \~30 broken footer links (high priority).](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [Investigate replicating the working blog redirect process.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [Review and approve the "Therapy4" template.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Provide a list of preferred research papers.](https://fathom.video/share/kmu7ikHkp4NBoYq2vHuoV24By3EvkFcY?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
